title: task
description: cbor.rs:246 - dec_f64() rejects 0xf9 (half-precision float), only accepting 0xfa (single) and 0xfb (double). RFC 8428 Section 12.3 says implementations SHOULD support half-precision. A peer sending a value encoded as f16 (e.g., small sensor reading) will cause decode to fail with InvalidInput. Fix: add 0xf9 case that reads 2 bytes and converts to f64.
close_reason: Fixed: dec_f64 now decodes CBOR half-precision floats (0xf9) via f16_to_f64 helper using bit manipulation for no_std compatibility
